scripts.db:migrate:latest: sst shell kysely migrate:latest --stage production && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:rollback: sst shell -- kysely migrate:rollback --all && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:latest:production: sst shell --stage production kysely migrate:latest && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:rollback:production: sst shell --stage production -- kysely migrate:rollback --all && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:down:production: sst shell --stage production -- kysely migrate:down --all && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:up: sst shell kysely migrate:up && npm run db:generate:types
scripts.db:migrate:down: sst shell kysely migrate:down && npm run db:generate:types
